nav.bannerDesc: We take on no new projects once full. Don't let someone else's idea ship before yours.

hero.sub: You've got a great idea for an app, website, or AI tool — but the backend, database, security, and deployment? That's where most non-technical founders get stuck.

chat.name: AI Assistant
chat.msg0: Can I book a table for 2?
chat.msg1: Sure! Tonight at 7 PM works. Shall I confirm?
chat.msg3: Done! Confirmation sent to your email.

for.sub: If you know your industry inside out but have never written a line of code — you're exactly who we built this for.

person0.dream: Turn my training programmes into an app
person0.build: Workout app with bookings, video plans, progress tracking & in-app payments

person1.build: Online ordering system, table reservations, and AI-powered customer service bot

person3.build: Booking system, auto-reminders, loyalty points, and a branded client app

person4.build: Full e-commerce store with inventory, payments, shipping tracking & analytics

person5.build: Listings portal, inquiry management, AI chatbot to qualify leads 24/7

for.cta: Sound like you? Let's build it

pain.sub: You can vibe-code a UI, use no-code tools, or even prompt GPT to write components — but there's a whole layer of tech that stops most people cold.

item0.title: No Backend? No Problem.
item0.desc: You have the UI idea — we wire up the server, APIs, and logic that actually make it work.

item1.title: Security You Can't Skip
item1.desc: Authentication, data encryption, OWASP best practices — we handle it so you never get hacked.

item2.title: Database Architecture
item2.desc: Choosing the right database, designing schemas, handling migrations — it's a full-time job. We've got it.

item3.title: Deployment & Hosting
item3.desc: From localhost to the internet. CI/CD pipelines, cloud setup, domain linking — all handled by us.

item4.title: Scaling Under Pressure
item4.desc: When your app goes viral, it needs to not crash. We build for scale from day one.

item5.title: Compliance & Privacy
item5.desc: GDPR, CCPA, user data rights — legal tech requirements that most developers forget. We don't.

services.sub: We don't just write code. We architect, secure, deploy, and maintain your entire product from day one.

item0.title: Mobile Apps
item0.desc: iOS & Android apps built with modern frameworks. From idea to App Store in weeks, not months.

item1.title: AI Agents
item1.desc: Custom AI that works for your business 24/7 — customer support, automation, data processing, whatever you need.

item2.title: Websites & Web Apps
item2.desc: Fast, beautiful, SEO-ready websites and full-featured web apps that actually convert visitors into customers.

steps.sub: Simple, transparent, and fast. No tech experience needed.

item0.title: Tell Us Your Idea
item0.desc: Book a free consultation. You don't necessarily need to know tech — just tell us what you want your app / website / agent to do.

item1.title: We Design & Build
item1.desc: Our team handles everything — architecture, code, database, security, and deployment. You stay in the loop every step of the way.

item2.title: You Launch & Grow
item2.desc: Get a fully working product ready. We hand it off clean and documented.

demo.sub: The examples below show the kind of products we can create for you from scratch, with the backend, integrations, and deployment handled properly.

mobile.p: If you need an app for customers, staff, or your own operations, we can build the full product, not just the screens. That means auth, payments, data flow, notifications, and everything behind the interface working together.

web.p: Whether you need a client portal, internal dashboard, booking platform, or SaaS product, we can build the full web app with the database, API, user accounts, billing, and infrastructure done properly.

ai.p: If you want AI in your business, we can build agents and automations that connect to your content, your tools, and your process, so they do useful work instead of just generating text.

cta.sub: Stop letting tech hold you back. DM us on Instagram and let's turn your vision into a real, production-ready product.
cta.note: Free consultation · No commitment · Response within 24h

footer.copy: © 2026 iCraftHK. Built with ❤️ for non-technical founders.

contact.sub: The fastest way to reach us is a quick DM on Instagram. Tell us about your idea and we'll get back to you within 24 hours with a free consultation.

ig.p: No contact forms. No email chains. Just a quick DM and we'll schedule a free 20-minute call to hear about your idea.
ig.soon: Instagram link coming soon — check back shortly
ig.estimation: Send us this and we'll give you a quick rough estimate.
ig.say0: What's your idea / what do you want to build?
ig.say3: What key features do you need?
ig.say4: Do you have a team, or is it just you?
ig.alert: We only respond to messages in this format. We want to save our energy for people who are serious about making their idea real.

faq0.a: Anyone with an idea — whether you're an expert in your field wanting to turn your expertise into an app (e.g. a coach wanting to create an app for their students), someone starting a business, or just looking to build a simple website. No technical background needed.

faq1.a: Pricing depends on the project scope. DM us on Instagram and we'll give you a free estimate after a quick chat.

faq2.q: How long does it take to build?
faq2.a: Most projects take 2–6 weeks depending on complexity. We'll give you a clear timeline upfront.

faq3.q: Why not just vibe-code it with AI? why need us?
faq3.a: AI can generate code, but you can't tell if it's good. Vibe-coded apps break silently and have hidden security flaws. The moment you need real integrations — payments, databases, auth, third-party APIs — you need an engineer making the right calls. We give you AI speed with expert oversight.

faq4.q: Do I need to know how to code?
faq4.a: Not at all. You just need an idea. We handle everything from architecture to deployment.

faq5.a: Yes, 100%. When the project is done, you get full ownership of the codebase and all assets.

faq6.a: We maintain the code for you. As services evolve and you get new ideas, just tell us what you want — we keep building. You own the vision; we handle the execution.

contact.footerCopy: © 2026 iCraftHK. Built with ❤️ for non-technical people.
